tool_name: CNC Turning — Cutting Force, MRR, Surface Roughness & Tool Life Estimation

inputs.name: Specific Cutting Force (k_c1) at h=1 mm
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 3002-4:2017 — Specific cutting force, material-dependent: ±8% (Sandvik Coromant)

inputs.name: Insert Nose Radius (r_ε)
inputs.note: ISO 1832 insert designation — 4th character; R = 0.4 → standard; R = 0.8 → medium
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Taylor Tool Life Constant (C) at Reference Conditions
inputs.note: From Sandvik TMMS or manufacturer data; steel P15 grade: C ≈ 180–250 m/min at n=0.25
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Taylor Exponent (n)
inputs.note: Carbide turning steel: n=0.20–0.30; ceramic: n=0.40–0.50; CBN hardened steel: n=0.45
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Discrete count variable, zero measurement uncertainty

formulas: MRR_cm3_min = Vc_m_min * f_mm_rev * ap_mm / 10   // [cm³/min] Material Removal Rate (MRR) Reference: MRR = V_c × f × a_p / 10 — Sandvik C-2920 §5.2

kc_mpa = kc1_mpa / Math.pow(f_mm_rev, 0.25)   // [MPa] Specific Cutting Force at Operating Conditions (k_c) Reference: k_c = k_c1 / f^0.25 — Kienzle model; turning chip thickness ≈ f for orthogonal cut
Fc_N = kc_mpa * f_mm_rev * ap_mm   // [N] Tangential Cutting Force (F_c) Reference: F_c = k_c × f × a_p — ISO 3685:1993
Pc_kw = Fc_N * Vc_m_min / 60000   // [kW] Net Cutting Power (P_c) Reference: P_c = F_c × V_c / 60000

Ra_um = 1000 * Math.pow(f_mm_rev, 2) / (32 * re_mm)   // [µm] Theoretical Surface Roughness (Ra) — Nose Radius Model Reference: Ra ≈ f²/(32·r_ε) × 1000 — ISO 4287; valid for ideal geometry, add 25% for real conditions
T_min = Math.pow(Taylor_C / Vc_m_min, 1 / Taylor_n)   // [min] Tool Life at Operating Cutting Speed (T) — Taylor Reference: Taylor's equation: T = (C/V_c)^(1/n) — ISO 3685:1993 Annex A

V1.error_msg: Tool life < 5 min: rapid tool wear regime — reduce V_c by 20% or select higher-grade insert coating (PVD AlTiN, CVD Al₂O₃)

V2.error_msg: Theoretical Ra > 6.3 µm: rough finish — reduce feed rate or increase nose radius for finish passes

V3.error_msg: Cutting power > 80 kW: verify lathe spindle motor rating; excessive power causes thermal distortion in workpiece

smart_warnings.message: Tool life < 10 min: uneconomical — optimise V_c using Taylor equation; target T = 15–20 min for productive insert change interval
High feed with low Ra requirement conflict — theoretical roughness model predicts Ra > specification; reduce f or apply wiper insert geometry
Low speed + high k_c: built-up edge risk on sticky materials — increase V_c above BUE threshold or apply coated grade with sharp edge prep
MRR > 500 cm³/min: heavy roughing — verify workpiece fixture rigidity and coolant pressure; chip control critical at high MRR
Deep cut with fine feed: check radial force F_p — deep cuts generate large passive forces that deflect thin workpieces; verify L/D ratio ≤ 4

fmea.effect: Tool life < 5 min: rapid tool wear regime — reduce V_c by 20% or select higher-grade insert coating (PVD AlTiN, CVD Al₂O₃)
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Theoretical Ra > 6.3 µm: rough finish — reduce feed rate or increase nose radius for finish passes
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Cutting power > 80 kW: verify lathe spindle motor rating; excessive power causes thermal distortion in workpiece
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Tool life < 10 min: uneconomical — optimise V_c using Taylor equation; target T = 15–20 min for productive insert change interval
High feed with low Ra requirement conflict — theoretical roughness model predicts Ra > specification; reduce f or apply wiper insert geometry
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: f_mm_rev > 1.0 && Ra_um < 3.2

fmea.failureMode: Low speed + high k_c: built-up edge risk on sticky materials — increase V_c above BUE threshold or apply coated grade with sharp edge prep
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Vc_m_min < 50 && kc_mpa > 3000

fmea.failureMode: MRR > 500 cm³/min: heavy roughing — verify workpiece fixture rigidity and coolant pressure; chip control critical at high MRR
Deep cut with fine feed: check radial force F_p — deep cuts generate large passive forces that deflect thin workpieces; verify L/D ratio ≤ 4
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: ap_mm > 10 && f_mm_rev < 0.2
